violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must register employee certified in food safety with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as pasta and sauces) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Sliced deli meats and cheeses was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date marks were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the refrigerator by the griddle and fryolator and the walk-in cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

The cutting boards on both the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Pasta, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Pasta was observed at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit. According to PIC pasta was cooked the prior night. Food items were voluntarily disposed of and proper cooling methods were discussed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The cutting boards on both the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
